context: Evaluates the correct use of the vault_change_password Tauri command to rotate the vault password. Tests that the solution passes both the old and new passwords and handles incorrect old-password errors.

checklist.name: vault_change_password invocation
checklist.description: The solution calls `vault_change_password` with two arguments: the current (old) password and the desired new password, in the correct order.

checklist.name: Old password verification error
checklist.description: When called with an incorrect old password, the error from `vault_change_password` is propagated to the caller rather than suppressed.

checklist.name: Data remains accessible
checklist.description: After password change, the solution demonstrates that notes are accessible by unlocking with the new password (calls `vault_unlock` with new password and then retrieves a note).

checklist.name: Old password rejected
checklist.description: After changing the password, attempting to unlock with the old password produces an error.
